cards.prompt: struct Point{int X,Y;} var a=new Point{X=1,Y=2}; var b=a; b.X=99; печатает a и b?
cards.code: struct Point { public int X; public int Y; } var a = new Point { X = 1, Y = 2 }; var b = a; b.X = 99; Console.WriteLine($"a=({a.X},{a.Y}) b=({b.X},{b.Y})");

cards.prompt: struct с List-членом: n2 = n1; n2.Number = 7; n2.Tags.Add(B); печать n1 и n2?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; struct Tagged { public int Number; public List<string> Tags; public Tagged(int n){Number=n;Tags=new List<string>();} public override string ToString()=>$"{Number} [{string.Join(", ", Tags)}]"; } var n1=new Tagged(0); n1.Tags.Add("A"); var n2=n1; n2.Number=7; n2.Tags.Add("B"); System.Console.WriteLine(n1); System.Console.WriteLine(n2);

struct PointS { public int X, Y; } long b0 = GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread(); var s1 = new PointS { X=1, Y=2 }; var s2 = s1; long b1 = GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread(); Console.WriteLine($"struct copy: {b1 - b0} bytes");
